description: Virtual Protocol (VIRTUAL) emerged in 2023 on Ethereum and later on Base as an AI-driven token enabling DeFi agent ownership and tokenized AI applications. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 VIRTUAL gives original VIRTUAL holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Virtual Protocol
